privileged_info_summary: The task uses real VLT (Very Large Telescope) FORS1 data of the Messier 12 globular cluster (V-band combined) sourced from ESA Hubble FITS Liberator datasets. The expected output paths for the CSV and text files match the task description and are explicitly checked in export_result.sh. The target star coordinates and ground-truth photometry values are dynamically calculated at runtime by python scripts to ensure accuracy.
